The forwarder as contractual carrier (NVOCC) or as agent of the master carrier issues this document subject to the contract of carriage and available liability regimes (e.g. maritime / multimodal as applicable). Goods are described as below; weights and measures are as declared by the shipper. The shipper warrants the accuracy of particulars and that goods are fit for sea carriage.
